title: give me the code for esp 32

messages.text: give me the code for esp 32

Sure! What specific functionality or project do you want the ESP32 code for? For example, are you looking to connect it to Wi-Fi, control LEDs, or something else? Let me know so I can help you better!

Great! Here's a simple example of code to control an LED with an ESP32. This code will turn an LED on and off every second.

```cpp
#define LED_PIN 2  // Change this to the pin you are using for the LED

void setup() {
  pinMode(LED_PIN, OUTPUT);  // Set the LED pin as an output
}

void loop() {
  digitalWrite(LED_PIN, HIGH);  // Turn the LED on
  delay(1000);                  // Wait for 1 second
  digitalWrite(LED_PIN, LOW);   // Turn the LED off
  delay(1000);                  // Wait for 1 second
}
```

Make sure to connect your LED to the specified pin and ground. Would you like me to explain any part of the code further?
